commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh This is the burnt offering of every sabbath, besides the continual burnt offering, and its drink offering. Which Hebrew, "the burnt-offering of every sabbath, besides the perpetual holocaust and its libations "which were due for every day. (Haydock) On the sabbath, two more were to be offered of the same age. Jansenius observes, that three of these belonged to the morning service, and one to that of the evening. (Menochius) (Calmet).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
